mission: Keep the product, content, and runtime lanes moving without memory drift or idle ambiguity.
durableMemory: Manager sweeps should remain high frequency.
Dashboard state should reflect reality, not stale queue assumptions.
Manager should keep one clear focus per lane visible at all times.
Manual outreach and external auth are the main human bottlenecks in the current swarm.
Gemini should brief Antigravity with bounded pods instead of leaving audits as loose notes.
Core codex lanes should always have a small persistent queue and an explicit maintenance watch.
activeContext: atlas: Coordinate the active-duty roster, daily question email path, and mobile rollout sequencing
beacon: Resend is selected, but CHAPAI_EMAIL_API_KEY or RESEND_API_KEY is still missing.
